title: Full Stack + AI Engineer
company_focus:
AI-powered platform connecting people and brands through
personalized experiences and loyalty programs
responsibilities: Lead technical implementation of REAL.AI consumer intelligence engine including data modeling, predictive algorithms, and personalized recommendation pipelines
Architect and build loyalty program infrastructure that ties user behaviors to rewards and predictive engagement cycles
Collaborate with mobile team to implement AI-driven personalization across feeds, notifications, and product recommendations
Develop and integrate API layers between Firebase, Zoho CRM, Segment, Voucherify, and internal data warehouse (GCP)
Build scalable backend services supporting dynamic campaigns, A/B tests, and loyalty redemptions
Partner cross-functionally with data science, marketing, and product design to translate consumer behavior into actionable features
Optimize performance, ensure data integrity, and design systems for scalability across millions of users
use_cases: Consumer intelligence engine for predicting user intent and behavior
Personalized recommendation systems for feeds, notifications, and products
Gesture-based loyalty experiences with predictive engagement cycles
Real-time campaign optimization using behavioral data
Emotional intelligence-driven experiences that adapt to user interactions
First-party data segmentation and behavior scoring for marketing
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves hands-on AI/ML engineering including
building REAL.AI consumer intelligence engine, implementing
predictive modeling, personalization algorithms, and
recommendation systems. The engineer will integrate
OpenAI/LangChain APIs, develop LLM-powered features, and
work with TensorFlow/PyTorch - directly building and
deploying AI models, not just supporting infrastructure.
